# Crawler-friendly rules for realready.app. The site went indexable on
# 2026-05-27. Sitemap is generated by @astrojs/sitemap at build time and
# excludes /privacy, /terms, /404 from sitemap-0.xml (see astro.config.mjs).
User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /404

Sitemap: https://realready.app/sitemap-index.xml
